items.title: Week 6 Fantasy Baseball Waiver Wire: Payton Tolle, Kyle Harrison emerging as must-add SPs
items.summary: We've got some starting pitchers worth getting excited about on the wire
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Devonshire, Patel, McLeod and Sharp named for NZ to face England in ODIs
items.summary: Quartet included in their first overseas ODI squad which will be Suzie Bates farewell to ODI cricket
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: 'Four days of hell in hospital' - Kearns on miscarriage
items.summary: Aston Villa and England midfielder Missy Bo Kearns says she spent "four days of hell in hospital" after suffering a miscarriage and contracting sepsis.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
